creator: john_m_cooper@yahoo.com
text:
editors/calligra spreadsheet program always throws an exception when exiting with an open spreadsheet file.

How-To-Repeat:  1) open an ODS spreadsheet file in editors/calligra (occurs in all versions)
 2) exit editors/calligra spreadsheet and an exception dialog is displayed 100% of the time
 3) if the file has not been saved, it is corrupted
 4) if the file has been saved before exitting, it is fine
